name: Orange-Glazed Sweet Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 4 lb Sweet potatoes, peeled and cut into 1-inch chunks (about 8 cups)
1 tbsp Light brown sugar, firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the potatoes in a 5-quart saucepan and cover with water. Bring to a boil over high heat.
2. Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes until almost tender.
3. Remove the peel from the orange using a small sharp knife; discard the white pith. Cut the peel into thin strips to make about 1/4 cup. Set aside.
4. Melt the butter in a 12-inch skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Drain the potatoes well and add them to the melted butter in the skillet. Cook and stir for about 5 minutes until the potatoes are lightly browned.
6. Stir in the orange peel, brown sugar, salt, and pepper. Cook and stir for about 1 minute longer until the sugar is dissolved and the potatoes are well glazed.
7. Serve spooned into a serving dish.
Makes 6 to 8 servings.
